content_body: Our family loved the cabin in its beautiful fall setting. Cool breezes, sparkling river, train track (perfect for flattening pennies and waving to passengers), fire pit (my granddaughter had her first s'more there!), hiking trails (carry a big stick & oxygen!), crackling fires, syrupy pancakes, pink sunrises, Scrabble & jigsaws, a speedy deer or two, "Mr. Happy" tree, a swaying swing or gentle rocking chair, enticing meals & sweet treats in town, leaves of gold, orange & red. . . Just being together as a family in a serene, embracing place. That's what I call a mountain getaway. We will be back.
title: Loved the Cabin & Beautiful Fall Setting
